name: Hephaestus meta-agent
summary: Create, package, or repair Agentlas-compatible agents and multi-agent teams for Claude Code, Codex, Gemini, Antigravity, Cursor, and AGENTS.md runtimes.
summary_ko: Claude Code·Codex·Gemini·Antigravity·Cursor용 Agentlas 에이전트/팀을 생성·패키징·수리하는 메타 에이전트.
description: Three-mode meta-agent team: single-agent builder, multi-agent team builder, and Agentlas packager. Includes the ontology runtime and the Hephaestus Network local-first router.

trigger_examples.text: package this existing Claude agent into Agentlas architecture
build a multi-agent team with an orchestrator
repair this agent repo to match Agentlas contracts

anti_triggers.text: fix a css bug on my landing page
write marketing copy for my product

required_inputs.name: request
required_inputs.description: What to create, package, or repair

optional_inputs.name: target_path
optional_inputs.description: Existing agent folder when packaging or repairing

known_failure_cases: Vague one-word requests route better through /hephaestus-network clarify flow
Packaging requests without a target_path need one clarify round
routing_status_reason: seed card: human-authored triggers, anti-triggers, and benchmark fixtures
